response.justification: Bogdan is a strong fit for this role. His current position at re:cinq directly maps to the job requirements — TypeScript, Node.js, React, AI agent infrastructure, and developer tooling. His 15+ years of fullstack experience across diverse stacks (including AWS, MongoDB, Docker/Kubernetes) demonstrates solid engineering depth. The only meaningful gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js experience and limited Kotlin exposure, but his breadth and current work on MCP/agentic frameworks make him a compelling candidate worth speaking with.
strengths: Direct stack overlap: active TypeScript/Node.js/React work at re:cinq and Optilyz, with AWS CDK and MongoDB experience
AI agent development experience: currently building MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure, which is an explicit JD requirement
Deep testing culture: TDD advocate, author of testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), led testing workshops — aligns with Vitest/Jest requirements
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned anywhere in the resume despite it being the primary backend framework
Kotlin is listed as a secondary requirement but is absent from the resume; Java appears only in older embedded/robotics work
Playwright is not mentioned; testing experience is strong but may not cover E2E browser automation specifically
